channel.title: 2026-03-18 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-18 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Superconductivity via Paramagnon and Magnon Exchange in a 2D Near-Ferromagnetic Full Metal and Ferromagnetic Half-Metal
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Zachary M. Raines and Andrey V. Chubukov
Author(s): Zachary M. Raines and Andrey V. Chubukov Theoretical analysis of two-dimensional electron systems shows that magnon-mediated interactions drive robust p -wave superconductivity within a ferromagnetically order state at a temperature significantly higher than in a paramagnetic state. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011059] Published Wed Mar 18, 2026

item.title: Superlinear Hall angle and carrier mobility from non-Boltzmann magnetotransport in the spatially disordered Yukawa-Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev model on a square lattice
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Davide Valentinis, Jörg Schmalian, Subir Sachdev, and Aavishkar A. Patel
Author(s): Davide Valentinis, Jörg Schmalian, Subir Sachdev, and Aavishkar A. Patel Exact numerical results for the dc magnetoconductivity tensor of the two-dimensional spatially disordered Yukawa-Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (2D-YSYK) model on a square lattice, at first order in applied perpendicular magnetic field, are obtained from the self-consistent disorder-averaged solution of the 2D-Y… [Phys. Rev. Research 8, 013299] Published Wed Mar 18, 2026

item.title: Understanding nematicity and band structure of FeSe by first-principles study and tight-binding model
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Miao-Miao Li, Xiu-Cai Jiang, and Yu-Zhong Zhang
Author(s): Miao-Miao Li, Xiu-Cai Jiang, and Yu-Zhong Zhang We systematically investigate the effects of spin order and orbital polarization on the electronic and magnetic structures of nematic FeSe using the LDA+U method. While our calculations with on-site Coulomb repulsion U∼4.5phantomůle0.28em0exeV can account for both the … [Phys. Rev. Research 8, 013298] Published Wed Mar 18, 2026
